name: Lighthouse Ethereum
description: Lighthouse Ethereum — CI/CD for Applications tool for developers. Specializes in Ethereum Client.

seo.title: Lighthouse Ethereum Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score
seo.meta_description: Complete Lighthouse Ethereum analysis: pricing, lock-in risk, migration difficulty. Compare with alternatives in CI/CD for Applications.

review.verdict: Lighthouse Ethereum is a Backend-as-a-Service tool.
pros: Speeds up development with pre-built backend primitives
cons: Limited customization for complex business logic
review.best_for: Startups and indie developers building MVPs
review.not_for: Teams with strict data residency requirements
